description: This image displays two logos on a white background. On the left, the Copernicus logo features a large light blue curved 'C' followed by the dark blue text "opernicus". The dot above the 'i' in "Copernicus" is a solid yellow circle. On the right, the European Commission logo is shown, consisting of the flag of Europe (12 yellow stars arranged in a circle on a blue rectangular field) overlaying a set of abstract, light grey curved lines resembling a building. Below the flag, the text "European Commission" is displayed in black, with a solid blue horizontal line beneath it.
